channel.title: Grand Prix Pal — Blog
channel.description: F1 2026 articles, analysis, travel tips, and fan guides from Grand Prix Pal.

item.title: F1 2026 Driver Lineup — Every Team, Every Seat
item.description: The complete 2026 F1 driver lineup: who drives where, the key moves, rookies to watch, and what each team's pairing tells you about their ambitions.
item.author: Grand Prix Pal

item.title: Drive to Survive Season 8 Set It Up. Here's What the 2026 Season Has Done With It.
item.description: Season 8 ended with Norris winning the title. Two races into 2026, he has zero points. Here's what happened to every major DTS storyline so far.
item.author: Grand Prix Pal

item.title: Best Airports for Every European Grand Prix in 2026
item.description: Which airports to fly into for each European F1 race, with transfer times, budget airline availability, and practical routing tips.
item.author: Grand Prix Pal

item.title: China 2026: Antonelli Made History While Both McLarens Sat in the Garage.
item.description: Kimi Antonelli won his maiden F1 race at 19. Both McLarens failed to start. Verstappen retired. Hamilton got his first Ferrari podium. Shanghai delivered.
item.author: Grand Prix Pal

item.title: Getting to the Montreal Grand Prix — The One Thing That Makes It Easy
item.description: How to get to Circuit Gilles Villeneuve for the 2026 Canadian Grand Prix. Metro, river shuttle, BIXI bikes and what to do after the race when everyone's fighting for the train.
item.author: Grand Prix Pal

item.title: You Just Finished Drive to Survive Season 8. Now Go to a Race.
item.description: Just finished DTS Season 8? Miami is 7 weeks away. Montreal is 10. Here's exactly how to go from your couch to trackside this year.
item.author: Grand Prix Pal

item.title: How to Use F1 Live Timing at the Track — A Practical Guide
item.description: Make the most of F1's live timing tools while watching from the grandstand: apps, screens, radio, and how to follow strategy in real time.
item.author: Grand Prix Pal

item.title: F1 2026 Tyre Compounds Explained — What the Colours Mean
item.description: A beginner-friendly guide to F1 tyre compounds for 2026: what the colours mean, when teams use each compound, and how strategy changes depending on the rubber.
item.author: Grand Prix Pal

item.title: F1 2026 Safety Features — How the New Cars Protect Drivers
item.description: An overview of the safety innovations built into the 2026 F1 regulations: crash structures, halo developments, fuel cell changes, and what they mean for the sport.
item.author: Grand Prix Pal

item.title: Australia 2026: Russell Won. Piastri's Grandstand Watched Him Crash Out Before the Race.
item.description: Russell won, Mercedes dominated, and Oscar Piastri crashed his McLaren on the formation lap in front of his own grandstand. The 2026 season began in chaos.
item.author: Grand Prix Pal

item.title: F1 Night Races — Everything You Need to Know for 2026
item.description: A complete guide to F1's night races in 2026: which races run under lights, what the experience is like, schedule differences, and practical tips for attending.
item.author: Grand Prix Pal

item.title: Attending F1 in 2026 on a Budget — A Realistic Guide
item.description: Practical strategies for attending a 2026 Grand Prix without overspending: affordable races, timing your bookings, accommodation hacks, and where to save.
item.author: Grand Prix Pal

item.title: F1 2026 Active Aero — What You'll Actually See at the Track
item.description: Active aerodynamics explained for fans: how the movable wings work, what they look like in person, and why they change how F1 cars race in 2026.
item.author: Grand Prix Pal

item.title: Best F1 Viewing Spots at Every 2026 Circuit
item.description: Where to sit or stand for the best views at each 2026 Grand Prix — grandstand recommendations, general admission tips, and what each vantage point offers.
item.author: Grand Prix Pal

item.title: F1 2026 Rule Changes Explained — What Fans Need to Know
item.description: A plain-English breakdown of every major 2026 regulation change: active aero, new power units, simplified floors, the cost cap, and what it all means for the racing you'll watch trackside.
item.author: Grand Prix Pal
